title: Funchal, Madeira — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Funchal, Madeira: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Funchal is a city in Madeira with a population of 111,892. The capital of Madeira Island, known for its lush gardens, Madeira wine, dramatic cliffs, and year-round mild climate.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
